visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a vibrant retail exhibition space with a yellow and teal color scheme. A woman wearing a brown beret and a cream dress is leaning over a bed setup. The bed has white sheets and pillows covered in large, colorful smiling polka dots. A yellow teddy bear sits on the bed corner. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a professional studio or well-lit shopping mall. (2) The woman moves into the frame and interacts with the bed, lying down and stretching her arms in a mock yawn. She smiles broadly at the camera. Graphic elements like floating clouds and the word 'SLEEP' appear in a film-strip frame overlay. The background shows signs with text like 'TAKE A BREAK' and brand logos. (3) The camera follows her to a new section of the store featuring a large red-rimmed convex mirror mounted on a yellow wall next to travel-themed signs like 'Next Stop'. She demonstrates taking a selfie in the mirror with her smartphone. Shelves in the background are filled with colorful merchandise and boxes. (4) In the final phase, she moves to a blue wall featuring a large red circular mascot graphic. She raises her hand to give the mascot a high five, aligned with the 'Give me five' text overlay. The video concludes with her speaking enthusiastically to the camera, with the exhibition dates 4/17-5/15 appearing on screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: haha baby. [Slogan]: TAKE A BREAK. [Slogan]: Next Stop. [Variety]: 三大打卡點. (2) [Subtitle]: 這一波呢我們有設了三個地方可以讓大家拍照. (3) [Subtitle]: 大門一進來就一張床. [Slogan]: HAVE A NICE DAY. [Slogan]: Cashier. (4) [Subtitle]: 嗯~ 伸個懶腰剛剛好. [Variety]: SLEEP. (5) [Subtitle]: 第二個旅行街景還有放了最流行的凸透鏡. (6) [Subtitle]: 就讓你一邊對著鏡子拍. [Slogan]: Give me five. (7) [Subtitle]: 到此一遊. (8) [Subtitle]: 第三個跟點點 Give me five. (9) [Subtitle]: 這一次為期將近一個月. [Variety]: 4/17-5/15. (10) [Subtitle]: 來逛逛看沒買也沒關係可以來拍照喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator/influencer presenting the pop-up store.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a tan/brown beret, a light cream-colored long dress/tunic with a 'HAHABABY' print, and a sheer white undershirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A highly designed pop-up retail space with yellow, teal, and blue walls. Features include a themed bed area, a travel-themed signpost, a convex mirror, and various brand mascots and merchandise shelves.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio features a bright, acoustic-pop background music track driven by a crisp rhythmic guitar and a light drum beat. A female narrator speaks with a high-pitched, enthusiastic, and friendly tone in Mandarin, promoting a specific location. Her voice is clear and prominent in the mix. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect occurs during a visual transition between the bed area and the travel sign section. The background music maintains a constant, energetic tempo of approximately 125 BPM. The narrator's speech rate remains fast and engaging, characteristic of promotional social media content. (3) Subtle digital 'pop' or 'ding' sound effects are heard intermittently, coinciding with the appearance of colorful graphic text overlays on the screen. There is no significant ambient noise, indicating a professional post-production environment where the music and vocals are carefully balanced for clarity. (4) As the video nears the end, the narrator's volume increases slightly to emphasize the event dates. The music continues its upbeat loop until the very end of the clip, where both the narration and the backing track fade out quickly and cleanly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Spot 1 -> Spot 2 -> Spot 3 -> CTA/Dates
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a brand's pop-up exhibition by showcasing visually attractive 'photo spots' (Instagrammable locations) and providing event details to encourage visitation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is actively promoting the 'haha baby' pop-up store, showing products, and providing event dates.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly polished promotional short video for a brand pop-up, using typical influencer marketing techniques like showcasing 'photo spots'.
